items.title: Twitch has new penalties for streamers caught viewbotting, CEO says
items.summary: Repeat offenders will be punished with "caps" on their views.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Ramp in talks to hit $40B+ valuation, 6 months after reaching $32B
items.summary: The company is reportedly in talks to raise another $750 million at a pre-money valuation of more than $40 billion. It last raised in November at $32 billion.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
items.summary: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.
